reach_why: Extends continual-learning critiques, but does not open wholly new territory beyond distribution shift, bias retention, and plasticity-stability tradeoffs.
novelty_why: Recasts replay, regularization, and rehearsal as epistemic denial mechanisms, linking stability methods to truth degradation under change.
falsifiable_why: Test by inducing shifting meanings and measuring whether stabilizers preserve past performance while reducing current-world accuracy.
explanation: Stability methods can preserve obsolete competence, making models seem reliable while misaligned with changing reality.
